characters.name: Andy McNally
characters.description: Andy McNallyBiographyFull NameAndrea Grace McNally SwarekAliasesThe IdealistBirth1984GenderFemaleStatusMarried toSam SwarekFamilySam Swarek(husband)Harlow Jay Swarek(step-daughter)Tommy McNally(father)Claire McNally(mother)RomancesSam Swarek(husband)Luke Callaghan(ex-fiancé)Nick Collins(ex-boyfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankConstableDivisionEpauletteStatus158722/616ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byMissy PeregrymAndy McNallyis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. She is portrayed byMissy Peregrym. Being a cop is in her blood. It’s all she's ever known and all she ever wanted to be. She is the ultimate rescuer and enabler, but quickly learns that she can't save the world because not everyone wants to be saved. Meet Andy McNally, who is empathetic (almost to a fault) and a born rescuer; the star player in 15 Division’s finest batch of rookies. A natural A-student, she's already clashing with her training officer,Sam Swarek, who keeps telling her she's got to learn to trust her instincts. While it never hurts to be prepared, part of being a good cop is learning what you can’t control—which is seriously not easy for this girl. Andy's the daughter of retired beat copTommy McNally: her bloodlineisthe blue line. But Tommy left the force under a cloud, and only Andy knows that he's now hitting the bottle. Andy is the most positive person on the job—because she knows first-hand where the job can take you, yet she doesn’t want to go there. Sam quietly believes that Andy could be made into a capable officer although training officers are the forbidden fruit, Andy is feeling the pull of his confidence in her. Because she herself can’t help but wonder after an endless series of screw ups, can she really do this job?

characters.name: Chloe Price
characters.description:
Chloe PriceBiographyFull NameChloe Price EpsteinAliasesThe Wildcard(by nickname)Jellyfish(code name)GenderFemaleStatusMarried toDov EpsteinFamilyFrank Best(godfather)RomancesDov Epstein(Husband)Wes(ex-husband)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankConstableDivisionEpauletteStatus15931762 and 9764ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons4•5•6Episodes34First4.02:"Homecoming"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byPriscilla FaiaChloe Price15 Division’s newest rookie is a wildcard—a little crazy, a little quirky—but she gets away with it because she also happens to be Staff Sergeant Frank Best’s goddaughter. To further complicate her arrival, she already has romantic history with one of the officers at 15 Division when she walks in the door. Chloe will find it difficult to navigate her way through the season with these weights holding her back. But she’s out to impress and earn the respect of her fellow officers this season, which will prove much harder than she first anticipated, even with her charming, eclectic ways.
She is dating Dov Epstein.  She was also married, which we find out in the season 4 finale.  In the series final Dov and Chloe got back together and she caught the bouquet from Andy and Sam's wedding and looked at dove and kissed him and in the future they eventually got married. StrengthsFearless about expressing herself. She's comfortable with her quirks..

characters.name: Chris Diaz
characters.description: Chris DiazBiographyFull NameChristian DiazAliasesThe Poster Boy(nickname)Pez(byDonovan Boyd)GenderMaleStatusSingleFamilyTina Diaz(mother)RomancesGail Peck(ex-girlfriend)Denise(ex-fiance)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankPolice ConstableDivisionEpauletteStatus158711ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byTravis MilneChris Diazis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. He is portrayed byTravis Milne. Ever since he was a kid, Chris had aspirations of becoming a cop. Chris knows the cop manual like the back of his hand, but he’s a small town boy who finds himself a bit lost amid the hustle and bustle of the metropolis, and can’t seem to find his stride as a big city copper. There are those who play by the book and then there’s Chris Diaz—he is the book. There is nothing he doesn’t know when it comes to the rules and regulations of the division. Chris’s uniform’s always perfect. Shoes always polished. Yes, sir. No, sir. He believes in the chain of command, following orders, doing the right thing. He’s a good soldier, and above all, he believes in defending the weak. But this small-town guy—suddenly thrown into the world of big city policing—is about to learn justhowimportant it is to know when to break the rules. Maybe one day he’ll impress the Superintendent; or even better, her daughter and fellow rookie Gail Peck.

characters.name: Christian
characters.description: Christian is Chris Diaz's son. He first appears when he is two when his mumDenise brings him to the station to meet Chris.

characters.name: Dov Epstein
characters.description: Dov EpsteinBiographyFull NameDov Ezekiel EpsteinAliasesThe Thrill-Seeker(nickname)Deckstein(byDonovan Boyd)GenderMaleStatusMarried toChloe PriceFamilyUnnamed parentsAdam Epstein†(older brother)RomancesChloe Price(Wife)Edie Larson(ex-girlfriend)Gail Peck(hook up)Sue Tran(ex-girlfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetectiveDivisionEpauletteStatus158721ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byGregory SmithDov Epsteinis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. He is portrayed byGregory Smith. Dov grew up idolizing "Starsky & Hutch" and has always wanted to drive fast cars and fire guns. A die-hard adrenaline junkie, his no-fear attitude stems from being raised on a steady diet of peace and love by his hippie parents. Dov Epstein, 15 Division’s live-wire rookie, has an exuberant approach to policing that often gets him into hot water…but it also gets results. Dov's psyched to be a cop, having spent years as a sickly kid, glued toStarsky & Hutchunder the disapproving eye of hippie parents. And now he feels like, and is a player—although the ladies might disagree. But after riding shotgun with sceptical training officer Oliver Shaw, Dov's going to start to see that there's more to policing than bad guys and gunplay. And he just might find a way to prove that beneath his wise-cracking exterior beats the heart of a serious police officer, ready to serve and protect.

characters.name: Duncan Moore
characters.description: Duncan MooreBiographyFull NameDuncan MooreAliasesGerald(byGail Peck)GenderMaleStatusSingleFamilyAlonso Santana (step father)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankConstableDivisionEpauletteStatus164271ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons5Episodes22First5.01:"Blink"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byMatt MurrayDuncan Mooreis a recurring character in thefifthandsixthseasons of theGlobaldramaRookie Blue. He is portrayed byMatt Murray. He's the commissioner's stepson and started his journey at the 15 division in season 5.Andy McNallywas his training officer. He screwed up on multiple occasions but Andy wanted to keep believing in him and she did until he bailed on her in the middle of a dangerous situation. She was stuck in a house with a small child and a gangbanger trying to kill the child. She had to report him and deemed him unfit for duty. He was suspended and ended up filing a case against Andy. It was eventually sorted out but he got to return to duty. In74 Epiphanies, Duncan told Andy that he is leaving 15 as he has been transferred to the 16 Divison.

characters.name: Edie Larson
characters.description: Edie Larsonis a recurring character in thefirstseason of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. She is portrayed byNatalie Krill. Edie is a stripper that helps in a child abduction case, she ends up datingDov Epstein.

characters.name: Elaine Peck
characters.description: Elaine Peck, Supt. Ops  Elaine Peck, the Superintendent in charge of Operations at the Metropolitan Police Service who might become the first female Chief of Police. She is played by Lauren Holly

characters.name: Frank Best
characters.description: Frank BestBiographyFull NameFrank Joseph BestAliasesSir, Sarge(by subordinates)Froink (by  Chloe)GenderMaleStatusMarried toNoelle WilliamsFamilyNoelle Williams(wife)Olivia Best(daughter)RomancesNoelle Williams(wife)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankStaff SergeantDivisionEpauletteStatus156335RetiredResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5Episodes45First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last5.01:"Blink"Portrayed byLyriq BentFrank Bestis a recurring character in theABCpolice dramaRookie Blue. He is portrayed byLyriq Bent. Froink (by  Chloe) Formerly a training officer himself, he becomes a staff sergeant at 15 Division after Boyko departs. He is romantically involved with Officer Noelle Williams. As of Season 4, he is engaged to her. They get married late in season 4.

characters.name: Gail Peck
characters.description: Gail PeckBiographyFull NameGail PeckAliasesThe Peck(nickname)Casper(byDov Epstein)Peckstein(withDov Epstein)McPeck(withAndy McNally)BirthNovemberGenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyBill Peck(father)Elaine Peck(mother)Steve Peck(brother)Sophie(adoptive daughter)RomancesHolly Stewart(ex-girlfriend)Chris Diaz(ex-boyfriend)Frankie Anderson(hook-up)Dov Epstein(kiss)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankPolice ConstableDivisionEpauletteStatus158727ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byCharlotte SullivanGail Peckis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. She is portrayed byCharlotte Sullivan. Gail appears cold and isolated from the rest of the rookies, but she put up a cruel demeanor due to pressure from her family expectations “Peckspectations”. At first, the other rookies assumed that Gail was going to use her connections in the force to climb the career ladder, however, Gail just wants to be a police officer. Being born into a decorated family of officers has a steep price tag; and it makes fitting in and gaining acceptance from your fellow rookies a daunting task. Underneath her caustic exterior, Gail is very sensitive and uses sarcasm as a defense mechanism. The moment someone calls her out on her shit, Gail vulnerability shows, and the only person who senses that, at first, is fellow rookieChris Diaz.

characters.name: Jerry Barber
characters.description: Jerry BarberBiographyFull NameJerry BarberAliasesThe MediatorBirth1973Death2012GenderMaleStatusDeceasedRomancesTraci Nash(fiancée)Unnamed ex-wifeOccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankSpecial LieutenantDivisionStatus15Murdered in the line of dutyResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3Episodes35First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last3.09:"Out of Time"Portrayed byNoam JenkinsJerry Barberis a main character in theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. He is portrayed byNoam Jenkins. Sexy smooth talking Detective Barber took his work easy, but was a passionate and caring police officer who died having vigorous parties, dedicated to the job and his colleagues. He hung out with the other officers down at the Black Penny and seemed to lead a relatively happy life. Unfortunately however, he was just coming out of a seemingly nasty divorce, and right into a relationship with single mother Officer Traci Nash. He proposed to her early on, however the relationship was short lived. Detective Barber was fatally stabbed while attempting to question a suspect relating to the abduction of Officer Gail Peck. He later died at the hospital. Jerry was an easy-going guy, always quick with humour and able to make friends. He was very smart, often closing a great deal of cases for the department and good with his informants. Jerry was a romantic at heart, deeply in love withTraci Nash, and gave her a knife with the inscription "Marry Me" as a reference to the first gift he ever gave her, a knife. He was a passionate and caring man, giving his all in every situation and generous with gift giving. Jerry was an easy-going guy, always quick with humour and able to make friends. He was very smart, often closing a great deal of cases for the department and good with his informants. Jerry was a romantic at heart, deeply in love withTraci Nash, and gave her a knife with the inscription "Marry Me" as a reference to the first gift he ever gave her, a knife. He was a passionate and caring man, giving his all in every situation and generous with gift giving. While he was a thoughtful man, he had made many mistakes in his life. He cheated on his ex-wife, blaming the fact that she had fallen out of love with him. His immaturity in these situations was a flaw that recognized and had been attempting to change about himself, often getting in trouble due to his passion overtaking him resulting in ill-timed or worded arguments.

characters.name: Jo Rosati
characters.description: Jo RosatiJo Rosati is portrayed by Camille Sullivan, Detective Jo Rosati is a former girlfriend of Luke Callaghan and who was also a former partner who chose her career first causing the pair to break up and later episodes revealed that the pair had lived together for about 2 to 3 years. 'After a long period of time Jo returned to division 15 regretting her decision of breaking up with Luke and tries to win him back as well as clashing with Andy Mcnally during the processes. Jo first appeared in season 2 episode 1 called "Butterflies" and later that season Andy and Luke got engaged but got called off after Luke cheated on Andy with Jo and it was also revealed that Luke used the same ring he used on his possible engagement with Jo as she implied the ring was originally 'hers. 'Later that season Luke 'had 'told Jo his feelings causing her to leave division 15.

characters.name: Jo Rosati
characters.description: Jo RosatiJo Rosati is portrayed by Camille Sullivan, Detective Jo Rosati is a former girlfriend of Luke Callaghan and who was also a former partner who chose her career first causing the pair to break up and later episodes revealed that the pair had lived together for about 2 to 3 years. 'After a long period of time Jo returned to division 15 regretting her decision of breaking up with Luke and tries to win him back as well as clashing with Andy Mcnally during the processes. Jo first appeared in season 2 episode 1 called "Butterflies" and later that season Andy and Luke got engaged but got called off after Luke cheated on Andy with Jo and it was also revealed that Luke used the same ring he used on his possible engagement with Jo as she implied the ring was originally 'hers. 'Later that season Luke 'had 'told Jo his feelings causing her to leave division 15.

characters.name: Juliet Ward
characters.description: Juliet WardBiographyFull NameJuliet WardAliasesToothbrush girl(byNick Collins)GenderFemaleStatusIn a relationship withNick CollinsFamilyUnnamedRomancesUnnamed exOccupationPolice officerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankConstableDivisionEpauletteStatus159688ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons5•6Episodes11First5.09:"Moving Day"Last6.10:"Breaking Up the Band"Portrayed byErin KarplukJuliet Wardis a main character in thesixthseason of theABCpolice dramaRookie Blue, and a guest in thefifth. She works for IA and is assigned to the bombing atDivision 15. She is portrayed byErin Karpluk. Nick meets Officer Juliet Ward who, unbeknownst to him, is an undercover officer for Internal Affairs. He expresses an immediate interest in her, but Ward tries not to get close to any of the officers that she is investigating. However, the two eventually give in to their feelings for each other and begin a relationship. When it comes to light that she is investigating their division, Nick breaks it off with her, feeling betrayed. At theendof Season 6, Ward is on her way to Vancouver when Nick stops her to tell her that he wants to go with her, indicating that he has forgiven her.

characters.name: Luke Callaghan
characters.description: Luke CallaghanBiographyFull NameLucas CallaghanAliasesThe Inside Man(nickname)GenderMaleStatusSingleFamilyUnnamed parentsRomancesJo Rosati(ex-girlfriend)Andy McNally(ex-fiancé)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetectiveDivisionStatus15ActiveResidenceToronto, OntarioCanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes35First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last4.13:"You Can See the Stars"Portrayed byEric JohnsonLuke Callaghanis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue, and then returns as a guest character in thethirdandfourthseasons. He is portrayed byEric Johnson. Luke's a tenacious detective. His smiling, gracious demeanor hides a tumultuous history: a grotesque family trauma left him a fragmented child, bouncing between foster homes. Maybe that's why he's drawn to Andy McNally—because he senses that behind her smile is a troubling family secret. Luke blames himself for letting the killer of rookie cop Zoe Martinelli get away. But, Andy has feelings for Officer Sam Swarek, her training officer, which takes Luke out of the way. Is Luke able to compete with Sam for Andy's love? Luke's attraction to Andy was apparent from the first episode, and hints of it continue throughout the first few episodes. In "Fite Nite" Luke is shown taking time away from work calls to talk to Andy and ask her about her attendance at the Fight Night Fundraiser, and he asks her for drinks that night.

characters.name: Luke Callaghan
characters.description: Luke CallaghanBiographyFull NameLucas CallaghanAliasesThe Inside Man(nickname)GenderMaleStatusSingleFamilyUnnamed parentsRomancesJo Rosati(ex-girlfriend)Andy McNally(ex-fiancé)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetectiveDivisionStatus15ActiveResidenceToronto, OntarioCanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4Episodes35First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last4.13:"You Can See the Stars"Portrayed byEric JohnsonLuke Callaghanis a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue, and then returns as a guest character in thethirdandfourthseasons. characters.name: Marlo Cruz
characters.description: Marlo CruzBiographyFull NameMarlo CruzAliasesThe Veteran(nickname)GenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyHarlow Jay Swarek(daughter)RomancesSam Swarek(ex-boyfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetectiveDivisionEpauletteStatus15637451 and 6272ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons4•5•6Episodes22First3.01:"Surprises"Last6.10:"Breaking Up the Band"Portrayed byRachael AncherilMarlo Cruzis a new Senior Officer who found no trouble making her new home at 15 Division. Ex-Swat, with nine years experience on the job, Marlo is no rookie. She’s smart, witty, and private, with an uncomplicated view towards life and relationships. Marlo’s been at Division 15 for three months when Nick and Andy return—bringing loads of unwanted drama with them. Her relationship with Swarek causes herself and Andy butt heads at first. Their different approaches to the job and to life in general contributes to their rocky relationship. But Marlo isn’t as straightforward as she seems—she’s got a secret, she's bipolar. When Andy finds out, Andy is sworn to secrecy as no one, not even Swarek knows. Marlo also has an unhealthy obsession with Kevin Ford after a predator case is closed, when she believes he is responsible even though it's been proven multiple times that he's innocent. Resulting in her driving him insane by sheer accident Andy and Sam also get involved in this. After Marlo breaks into Ford's house and leaves her fingerprints, Andy has to lie in Marlo's records! When Kevin Ford constructs a hit-list with officers from 15 Division on it, he begins to pick them off. They rush to Marlo's house to check her safety, but Marlo left for her sisters. Then, in her basement, Nick Collins finds a study into Kevin Ford constructed by Marlo, including confidential records. After an investigation into her, and how she can cope with being an officer and bipolar, she is given a job as a detective, whom Dov works for in season 6.

characters.description: Marlo CruzBiographyFull NameMarlo CruzAliasesThe Veteran(nickname)GenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyHarlow Jay Swarek(daughter)RomancesSam Swarek(ex-boyfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetectiveDivisionEpauletteStatus15637451 and 6272ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons4•5•6Episodes22First3.01:"Surprises"Last6.10:"Breaking Up the Band"Portrayed byRachael AncherilMarlo Cruzis a new Senior Officer who found no trouble making her new home at 15 Division. characters.name: Nick Collins
characters.description: Nick CollinsBiographyFull NameNicholas Michael CollinsAliasesThe Purist(nickname)GenderMaleStatusIn a relationship withJuliet WardFamilyunnamed†(Mother)unnamed†(Father)Finn Collins(Brother)RomancesGail Peck(ex-fiancé)Andy McNally(ex-girlfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankPolice ConstableDivisionEpauletteStatus159957ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons3•4•5•6Episodes48First3.01:"The First Day of the Rest of Your Life"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byPeter MooneyNick Collinsis a main character in thethird,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice dramaRookie Blue. He is an officer at the 15 Division of the Metropolitan Police Service. He is portrayed byPeter Mooney. Nick Collins joins the Rookie Blue cast in Season 3 the dayAndy McNally's suspension ended. He is known as the 15 Division's newest rookie. He is known to have an "old" history withGail Peck, he used to be Gail's old flame. Later, during the season you find out that Nick and Gail were going to get married until Nick backed out at the last minute. Nick has served three tours in Afghanistan, helping his country only to come back and be transferred as a rookie to the 15 Division. Nick's parents died in a car crash by a drunk driver, with his brother and him in the back seat. But it turns out that his brother, Finn, was the one driving, and it was Finn's fault that they crashed. Finn was paralyzed in the accident and disappeared from Nick's life for about 18 years. Before the series began he was in a relationship with Gail Peck, and they were ready to marry in Las Vegas before he enlisted. Nick has always known that he wanted to help people when he grew up. He's a quick learner, but stubborn at the same time. He would give up his life to protect others.
characters.personality_section: Nick has always known that he wanted to help people when he grew up. He's a quick learner, but stubborn at the same time. He would give up his life to protect others.

characters.name: Noelle Williams
characters.description: Noelle WilliamsBiographyFull NameNoelle Grace WilliamsAliasesThe Hard-Ass(nickname)GenderFemaleStatusMarried toFrank BestFamilyOlivia Best(daughter)RomancesFrank Best(husband)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankInternal Affairs OfficerDivisionEpauletteStatus156579ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•6Episodes41First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.08:"Integrity Test"Portrayed byMelanie Nicholls-KingNoelle Williamsis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. She is portrayed byMelanie Nicholls-King. A tough and capable police officer, Noelle is not only great at her job, but is also an invaluable mentor for the rookies in her division. Even though her tough past as she killed both her parents and the police couldn’t prove it. In a single morning she can teach you one of the most valuable life lessons:get over yourself. But being a cop and having a personal life outside of the job is easier said then done. For a single woman who's about to embark on one of the biggest decisions of her life, the possibility of being responsible for more than just herself is scarier to her than any criminal that she’s ever come across. She chooses to use fertility treatments to get pregnant and blames her biological clock. She gives birth to a little girl nearing the end of season 3, on the same day that Officer Jerry Barber passed away. We learn in the beginning of season 4 that she named the little girl Olivia. During Season 4, she enters a romantic relationship withFrank Bestand he proposes to her and they become engaged. They get married late in season 4.

characters.name: Oliver Shaw
characters.description: Oliver ShawBiographyFull NameOliver ShawAliasesThe Sandwich Eater(nickname)GenderMaleStatusIn a relationship withCeleryFamilyZoe Shaw(ex-wife)Izzy Shaw(daughter)Maddy Shaw(daughter)Unnamed daughterRomancesCelery(girlfriend)Zoe Shaw(ex-wife)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankStaff SergeantDivisionEpauletteStatus156416ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byMatt GordonOliver Shawis a main character in theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. He is portrayed byMatt Gordon. Officer Shaw is a go-along, get-along kind of guy. Easy-going, yes—but don’t make the mistake of thinking he’s a pushover, or you’ll be in for a rude awakening. This married father of three is happiest spending one on one time with his family (or a good sandwich). The kind of cop that doesn’t go looking for trouble, Shaw also won’t shy away from it when it finds him. His easygoing nature makes his approach to policing low-key; which means he’s got his work cut out for him when it comes to training Dov. In season three he gets kicked out of his house and has to deal with some family problems. Him and his wife try it again a couple of times but it doesn't seem to work out. In season 4 on the night of Noelle and Frank's wedding he refuses to go to the wedding because his wife will be there with a date. Officer Dov Epstein sets him up with a woman. Officer Shaw is a go-along, get-along kind of guy. Easy-going, yes—but don’t make the mistake of thinking he’s a pushover, or you’ll be in for a rude awakening. characters.name: Sam Swarek
characters.description: Sam SwarekBiographyFull NameSamuel Jay SwarekAliasesThe Rogue(nickname)Sammy(by everyone)Uncle Sammy(byIzzy Shaw)Birth1978GenderMaleStatusMarried toAndy McNallyFamilyAndy McNally(wife)Harlow Jay Swarek(daughter)Sarah Swarek(sister)Jay Swarek(father)Unnamed MotherRomancesAndy McNally(wife)Marlo Cruz(ex-girlfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetectiveDivisionEpauletteStatus156114ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byBen BassSam Swarekis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. He is a detective atDivision 15and married toAndy McNally. He is portrayed byBen Bass. Sam Swarek knows the streets like the back of his hand. After 8 months undercover, living as a drug dealer, Sam’s cover is blown. Now suddenly he’s back on the beat, training upstart rookie Andy McNally, the exact same one who blew his cover. He’s determined to get back to the guns and gangs squad, and as far away from Andy as possible. The trouble is, undeniable sparks with his new rookie seem to be getting in the way. Even though Andy is his rookie (and the person who screwed up his 8 months investigation), he can't help the fact that he has feelings for her; he must choose how to act with her. The highly competant and professional training officer or the man that she may find happiness with... What should he do? Sam became a cop after his sister, Sarah, was attacked one night. It is hinted that after the attack she became withdrawn and depressed. After seeing what his sister went through, he wanted to make sure that the people like those who did that to her were punished.

characters.name: Traci Nash
characters.description: Traci NashBiographyFull NameTraci NashAliasesThe Loyalist(nickname)Trace(byJerry Barber)Birth1987GenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyLeo Slade(son)RomancesDex Slade(ex-boyfriend)Jerry Barber†(former fiancé)Steve Peck(ex-boyfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetective Sergeant, Head of Guns & GangsDivisionEpauletteStatus158715ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byEnuka OkumaTraci Nashis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. She is portrayed byEnuka Okuma. A single mom with a six-year-old son, Traci prides herself on her independence. She is Andy’s best friend from the academy and just like Andy, she is smart and hard-working. Yet the persona Traci projects – one of authority and composure – is much different from how she actually feels. Behind the confidence and brashness hides a deep well of uncertainty. Meet Traci Nash,Andy’s best friend from childhood. The calm in the eye of the storm and the consummate confidant, Traci is the anchor for her fellow rookies at 15 Division. Traci reads people in a heartbeat, she suspects everyone who breathes, and she doesn’t have the patience for politics or subtleties. She’s also the only one of the five who didn’t go to college—but her street smarts almost make up for her lack of education. And she's got a weakness for DetectiveJerry Barber. She met him at the Academy, and their affair was going strong- until it became something serious. Jerry proposes to Traci by giving her a shiv withMarry Meinscribed on it, symbolic of the first gift he gave her. She accepts after some convincing, but the celebration is short. Days later, he is killed while trying to save an abducted officer,Gail Peck. Traci’s hard-won life experience and her straight-forward approach to policing are going to make her a successful rookie officer: it seems like she's got it all figured out. If only people knew...

characters.name: Traci Nash
characters.description: Traci NashBiographyFull NameTraci NashAliasesThe Loyalist(nickname)Trace(byJerry Barber)Birth1987GenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyLeo Slade(son)RomancesDex Slade(ex-boyfriend)Jerry Barber†(former fiancé)Steve Peck(ex-boyfriend)OccupationPolice OfficerAffiliationMetropolitan Police ServiceRankDetective Sergeant, Head of Guns & GangsDivisionEpauletteStatus158715ActiveResidenceToronto, Ontario, CanadaAppearancesSeasons1•2•3•4•5•6Episodes74First1.01:"Fresh Paint"Last6.11:"74 Epiphanies"Portrayed byEnuka OkumaTraci Nashis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth,fifthandsixthseasons of theABCpolice drama seriesRookie Blue. She’s also the only one of the five who didn’t go to college—but her street smarts almost make up for her lack of education. And she's got a weakness for DetectiveJerry Barber. She met him at the Academy, and their affair was going strong- until it became something serious. Jerry proposes to Traci by giving her a shiv withMarry Meinscribed on it, symbolic of the first gift he gave her. She accepts after some convincing, but the celebration is short. Days later, he is killed while trying to save an abducted officer,Gail Peck. Traci’s hard-won life experience and her straight-forward approach to policing are going to make her a successful rookie officer: it seems like she's got it all figured out. If only people knew...
